====Pokémon====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Larry
|pkmn=Komala
|type1=Normal
|img=Larry Komala Adventures.png
|epnum=PASV20
|epname=
|desc={{p|Komala}} is Larry's first known Pokémon. It was first used to prevent {{Violet}} from escaping his battle with Larry by hitting {{ga|Miraidon}} with its saliva, instantly making it fall asleep. Later, it was used to battle against {{Violet}}'s {{p|Lokix}} but lost.

None of Komala's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Staraptor 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Larry
|pkmn=Staraptor
|tera=Normal
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Larry Staraptor Adventures.png
|cap=Larry's Staraptor
|img2=Larry Terastallized Staraptor Adventures.png
|img2_size=120px
|cap2=Larry's Terastallized Staraptor
|epnum=PASV20
|epname=
|desc={{p|Staraptor}} is Larry's second known Pokémon. It was first used to forcibly carry {{Violet}} and [[Arven]] to the [[Medali Gym]] so the former could register for his battle with Larry. Later, it was Larry's third choice in his battle with Violet. Despite being [[Terastal]]lized to remove its weakness to {{type|Rock}} moves, Staraptor fell after Violet turned his {{p|Clodsire}} into a Rock-type to make its {{m|Rock Slide}} stronger.

None of Staraptor's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Dudunsparce 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Larry
|pkmn=Dudunsparce
|type1=Normal
|img=Larry Dudunsparce Adventures.png
|epnum=PASV20
|epname=
|desc={{p|Dudunsparce}} is Larry's third known Pokémon. It was Larry's second choice in his battle with {{Violet}}. After defeating Violet's {{p|Lokix}}, it went up against his {{p|Smoliv}}, who covered its body in oil to make Dudunsparce's moves slip off, reducing the damage they dealt. Dudunsparce put Smoliv to sleep, only for it to retaliate with a {{m|Sleep Talk}}-{{m|Flail}} combination, knocking Dudunsparce out.

Dudunsparce's known moves are {{m|Hyper Drill}} and {{m|Take Down}}.}}
{{-}}
